text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around the<n>academy, I
spot Sakura Chiyono O<n>talking to a
worried-looking Yaeno<n>Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sooo what you're saying is... you'd<n>like me to
help you with some singing<n>training?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The truth is that there's a certain<n>genre I
just can't seem to get the<n>hang of.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Specifically... songs with, um, hints of<n>r-romance...
I find them<n>embarrassing—both to sing and listen
to.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I seeee. Love songs, huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, as there's a possibility I'll<n>have to
sing them during a winning<n>concert, I can't
complain!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A win without the perfect winning<n>concert is
utterly unthinkable!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Therefore I must overcome my sense<n>of shame,
no matter the cost!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can endure all manner of training. So,<n>please, I
beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll do it! It's just like they<n>always say,
there's no such thing as<n>a free win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's start by having you read<n>the lyrics
aloud. That way, you can<n>gradually get used to
them!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: O-osu! Ahem, here I go, then!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The moment you leave, I f-feel so<n>a-alone... The
warmth of y-you... The<n>warmth of y-your hand?
Is... so...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hngh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
W-well, it's j-just... these lyrics are...<n>so much
more intense than I was<n>expecting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Should we stop?! Don't push<n>yourself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
N-no! Backing down now would be<n>akin to failing
altogether!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I-I had t-told you... I l-l-loooooved<n>you... b-back
then... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...If I had formally proposed a<n>relationship...
perhaps our future<n>would've been different...
Maybe not,<n>though...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Come on, Yaeno! You can't change<n>the lyrics!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I know what it's like to be... t-to be<n>l-l-l-lonely...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how helpless the heart of a<n>maiden can be
when she seeks to<n>open it and reveal the
emotion within...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like you're reciting classical<n>poetry
now!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A few words alone can carry greater<n>weight than
a mountain, and depth<n>greater than even the
ocean.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You do not know, my beloved, that<n>there is no
one else for me but you...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...And you're done, right?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
M-my deepest apologies! I<n>succumbed to my old
habits. I have<n>failed...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, wait... I actually think it's okay to<n>do it your
own way!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sure, the lyrics are a little formal, butthat's what makes them so you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It reminds me of a saying I once<n>heard!
"Different cleats for different<n>feets"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Instead of trying to overcome it, you<n>should
embrace your unique singing<n>style! That's the
way to do it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O! I am in your debt!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Indeed, the classical poems I've<n>come to
cherish also express<n>deep-seated feelings in
vivid detail.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Be it a love song or an old poem, the<n>emotions
expressed are not all that<n>different.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, all I need to do... istake to the stage and fully expressmyself as I am!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A gleaming grin spreads across<n>Yaeno Muteki's
face, as if the clouds<n>hanging over her have
parted.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is indeed as you said. If I have<n>more
confidence in myself as I<n>practice... I'm certain I
will become a<n>great singer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I must learn and<n>experience more
still! I will not stop<n>until I've mastered all the
ancient<n>poems!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Uh, no?! You're changing your goal a<n>little there,
Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...At any rate, it looks like Yaeno<n>Muteki feels a
bit more confident<n>singing love songs now.
